column1: # source: BLS ATUS 2023-2024 leisure/sports participation (bls.gov/tus/) + Pew Research lifestyle/religion + Outdoor Industry Assn and BLS volunteering data. Weights are relative propensity 0..1 grounded in known demographic patterns: gaming peaks young/male; reading and gardening peak older/female; religious activity and volunteering rise with age; team sports and gym skew young; live music/dining-out skew young; hiking/outdoors skews male; cooking/gardening/volunteering skew female. Age collapsed to young=18-34
